meta.note: Manually maintained. Add one-off events under 'events' and repeating ones under 'recurring'. See README.md for instructions.

sources.name: City of Brussels protest & traffic notices

events.title: Klimaatmars / Marche pour le Climat
events.organizer: Klimaatcoalitie / Coalition Climat (with Amnesty International and others)
events.notes: Details (time, meeting point) not yet announced as of 2026-07-10 — check source before attending.

recurring.title: Rassemblement : Contre le colonialisme, le fascisme, les guerres et génocides !
recurring.notes: Weekly rally, every Tuesday. Listed on Démosphère through end of 2026.

recurring.title: Rassemblement : Back to la Bourse for Palestine !
recurring.notes: Weekly rally, every Wednesday. YOUCA also lists a daily 19:00 Gaza protest at the Bourse — check sources for other days.

recurring.title: Critical Mass Brussels (protest bike ride)
recurring.notes: Last Friday of every month. YOUCA listed the next ride as '29 August' (a Saturday) — the last Friday of August 2026 is the 28th, so verify the exact date with the organizers.
